name: tabs
title: Tabs
description: Horizontal row of labeled tabs with one active label. A primitive: it owns the selection and the label row, not the panels below it. Keys left/right and tab/shift+tab cycle and wrap.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Construct with New(theme).WithTabs([...]).WithActive(0). Forward tea.KeyMsg through Update and read Active() to switch the panel your parent model renders below the tab row.
